headline.purpose: Section headings, one per section, no repeated kicker above them.

label.purpose: Real data only — coordinates, status tags, code, timestamps. Never decorative.

shadows.name: route-glow
shadows.purpose: Marks the one live surface per view — the animated route line, the CTA panel.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Keyboard focus on every interactive element.

motion.name: ease-out-expo
motion.purpose: Default easing for reveals and state transitions — no bounce, no elastic.

motion.name: route-trace
motion.purpose: Animated migration route line in the hero chart; swaps to a static mid-path marker under prefers-reduced-motion.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA action — Waypoint Amber fill, ink-dark text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: oklch(74% 0.14 55); color: oklch(18% 0.03 55); font-family: Archivo, sans-serif; font-weight: 650; font-size: 0.92rem; padding: 12px 22px; border-radius: 8px; border: none; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1), transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(80% 0.13 55); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(16% 0.012 55), 0 0 0 4px oklch(74% 0.14 55); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action — transparent with hairline border.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: transparent; color: oklch(96% 0.012 80); font-family: Archivo, sans-serif; font-weight: 650; font-size: 0.92rem; padding: 12px 22px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid oklch(100% 0 0 / 14%); transition: border-color 0.2s, color 0.2s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: oklch(74% 0.14 55); color: oklch(80% 0.13 55); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(16% 0.012 55), 0 0 0 4px oklch(74% 0.14 55); }

components.name: Platform Log Row
components.description: Manifest-style row for repeated platform entries — replaces icon-card grids.
components.html: IBM watsonx OrchestrateBuilding
components.css: .ds-log-row { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 16px 4px; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(100% 0 0 / 8%); font-family: Archivo, sans-serif; } .ds-log-name { color: oklch(96% 0.012 80); font-weight: 550; font-size: 0.95rem; } .ds-log-status { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.68rem; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 999px; } .ds-status-building { background: oklch(72% 0.11 150 / 12%); color: oklch(72% 0.11 150); }

components.name: Terminal Data Card
components.description: Houses the real canonical IR YAML snippet — the page's data-visualization moment.
components.html:
agent.ir.yaml
spec_version: wheatear/v1
name: support_router
source: copilot-studio
components.css: .ds-terminal { background: oklch(22% 0.015 55); border: 1px solid oklch(100% 0 0 / 8%); border-radius: 14px; overflow: hidden; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; } .ds-terminal-bar { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 12px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(100% 0 0 / 8%); } .ds-terminal-bar .dot { width: 9px; height: 9px; border-radius: 50%; } .dot.slate { background: oklch(68% 0.045 240); } .dot.gold { background: oklch(78% 0.12 85); } .dot.amber { background: oklch(74% 0.14 55); } .ds-terminal-tab { margin-left: 8px; font-size: 0.72rem; color: oklch(74% 0.02 70); letter-spacing: 0.04em; } .ds-terminal-body { margin: 0; padding: 20px; font-size: 0.82rem; line-height: 1.7; color: oklch(74% 0.02 70); }

narrative.overview: Wheatear's surface is a working instrument, not a brochure. The reference object is a flight or shipping logbook crossed with a navigational chart: route lines, waypoint coordinates, manifest stamps, departure-board precision. Every recurring visual device on the page earns its place by doing the job a real logbook entry does, rather than decorating a heading. This is a deliberate departure from the page's first draft, which leaned on an italic display serif, a small uppercase mono eyebrow repeated above every section, and a wall of identical icon-cards — the most saturated AI-template pattern in circulation right now. Wheatear rejects it explicitly.
keyCharacteristics: Flight-log instrument panel, not SaaS brochure — route lines, waypoints, manifests, stamps.
One saturated color (Waypoint Amber) used deliberately, never as ambient decoration.
Mono type appears only on real data, never as a decorative section kicker.
Repeated content reads as log rows or a true numbered sequence, never a wall of icon-cards.
Flat at rest; depth comes from hairline borders and state-triggered glow, not ambient shadows.

rules.name: The Single Waypoint Rule
rules.body: Waypoint Amber is the only saturated color the page contains. It marks something live — a route, an action, a status — never decoration.

rules.name: The No-Cream Rule
rules.body: The body background is never a warm off-white. It is Logbook Black or one of its tonal steps, full stop.

rules.name: The Data-Earns-Mono Rule
rules.body: JetBrains Mono is reserved for things that are literally data. It never substitutes for a section kicker or a decorative label.

rules.name: The One Kicker Rule
rules.body: At most one section on the page may carry a small label above its heading. Every other section leads with the heading directly.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces sit flat at rest. Shadow or glow appears only as a response to hover, focus, or to mark something as live.

dos: Do use Archivo at full weight contrast (800 display against 450 body) to carry hierarchy from one family.
Do reserve JetBrains Mono for real data.
Do let Waypoint Amber mark exactly one live thing per view.
Do render repeated content as log rows, and the pipeline as a true numbered sequence.
Do keep surfaces flat at rest; reserve glow/shadow for hover, focus, and live state.
donts: Don't use Fraunces, Inter, or any italic display serif.
Don't repeat a small uppercase tracked eyebrow above more than one section heading.
Don't build a grid of identical icon-cards for repeated content.
Don't use a cream, sand, or off-white body background.
Don't add ambient drop shadows to static panels.
Don't use a colored border-left/border-right stripe as a callout accent.
Don't use background-clip: text gradient headlines.
